task_completion.description: Agent accessed the FreeScout helpdesk system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser is open to localhost:8080 and displays the FreeScout interface.
The ticket with the subject 'VPN Connection Dropping Intermittently' from Rachel Morrison is open in the main view.
The reply text box contains the troubleshooting steps, specifically mentioning 'restart your network adapter', 'Clear Cache', and 'vpn2.acmecorp.com'.

task_completion.description: Agent sent the reply to the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drafted reply appears as a sent message in the ticket's conversation history.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the ticket status to Pending.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket status indicator (badge or dropdown) shows that the status is 'Pending'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with FreeScout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within the FreeScout web interface in a browser, not via terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.

integrity.description: The reply was sent within the FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reply is part of the FreeScout conversation thread, not just typed in a separate text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: The UI was not manipulated using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools are not open, and the UI elements look like standard FreeScout components.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target ticket subject: 'VPN Connection Dropping Intermittently'. Target customer email: rachel.morrison@acmecorp.com. Required phrases in the reply: 'restart your network adapter', 'vpn2.acmecorp.com', and 'Clear Cache'. The final conversation status must be 'Pending'.
